title: Elle Anderson
content:
People.ContactEmail elanderson@mccarthy.ca
- University of Toronto
Elle is a recent J.D. graduate from the University of Toronto Faculty of Law. She also holds a Bachelor of Science with distinction from the University of Alberta, where she conducted research at the Faculty of Medicine focused on pregnancy complications.
Before law school, Elle channeled her passion for luxury beauty into entrepreneurship, founding and operating Jewel Haus Cosmetics Inc., an e-commerce business specializing in makeup.
During law school, Elle was deeply engaged in student life and advocacy. She served as Co-President of both the Black Law Students’ Association and OUTLaws, where she led community-building initiatives and worked to expand institutional support for equity-deserving groups.
Outside of law, Elle enjoys travelling, practicing yoga and pilates, and discovering hidden speakeasies across Toronto.
